creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I have tried to build Perl 5.8.8 on a freshly installed FreeBSD 7.0,
	and I get an error when linking libperl.so.  I'm not 100% sure why,
	but if -shared is manually added to the Makefile inside the work
	dir, it'll get farther (but then it'll complain at x2p saying it
	can't make <command-line>).  I couldn't find a fix to get it to
	any farther.

Fix: (The "Fix" is just my build log, I could not find a fix.)
	
How-To-Repeat: 	Try to build land/perl5.8 under FreeBSD 7.0 using BATCH=yes as a make flag
